Inside, marble floors with detailed carpet inlays set the tone for timeless sophistication. mlsDescription: Location Location! This one of a kind Historic home also known as the Meres / Salley House and is located in the heart of Tarpon Springs! With almost one acre of mature 100 year oaks and tropical and exotic plants, you can stroll along a menagerie of pathways through its lushly landscaped gardens. This historic home has been completely renovated and boosts over 3000 sq. ft. of air conditioned living space with an attached apartment. In addition there are three additional out buildings, two of which have air conditioned space with bathrooms and one workshop. This home features beautiful hard wood floors throughout the main floor, a brand new kitchen, granite counter tops and new appliance package and wine cooler.
